evidence.label: rusty-kaspa v2.0.1
evidence.note: mainnet Toccata maintenance release published 2026-06-15; usable as a drop-in upgrade version for v2.0.0 nodes and pre-Toccata 1.x nodes, with seq-commit lane-proof RPC and covenant-binding refinements; activation is still scheduled and not independently verified

evidence.label: rusty-kaspa v2.0.0
evidence.note: mainnet Toccata release published 2026-06-05; activation is scheduled for DAA score 474,165,565 and is not active at this audit date

evidence.note: mainnet sanity-testing pre-release; explicitly not mainnet activation

targets.use: deterministic txscript packages for the source-grounded V1 subset
Toccata testnet posture for upgrade compatibility checks
analysis surface for recognized but not fully lowered Toccata features
future gate that remains blocked until mainnet activation and lowering evidence are verified

baseline_toccata_release.role: baseline release that announced the mainnet activation DAA score

fee_policy.consensus: standard fee policy is not consensus; zero-fee transactions remain consensus-valid
fee_policy.post_activation: RPC and P2P relay reject transactions below the higher minimum standard fee
fee_policy.pre_activation_p2p: P2P relay keeps the pre-activation policy until activation
fee_policy.pre_activation_rpc: direct RPC transaction submission applies the higher minimum standard fee

integrator_actions: Upgrade nodes to rusty-kaspa v2.0.1 before the scheduled activation window.
Run full wallet, explorer, miner, pool, and indexer rehearsal on Testnet-10.
Add compatibility coverage for seq-commit lane-proof RPCs and covenant binding refinements.
Update gRPC/protobuf integrations for transaction version 1 covenant and compute_commit fields.
Use node fee estimation when available; otherwise apply the Toccata minimum standard fee formula.
Prefer storage_mass/storageMass in new JSON and protobuf integrations; treat mass as deprecated compatibility only.
Keep KaspaScript future-mainnet packages blocked until activation evidence is independently verified.

kips.kaspa_script_integration: gate OpZkPrecompile 0xa6 until proof ABI fixtures and pricing tests are pinned
kips.status: Proposed; implemented and activated in TN10
kips.title: New Transaction Opcodes for Verifiable Computation

kips.kaspa_script_integration: model full transaction introspection, byte-string ops, keyed hashes, and post-activation script limits behind Toccata targets
kips.title: Covenants and Improved Scripting Capabilities

kips.kaspa_script_integration: emit covenant lineage metadata now; lower covenant binding opcodes only after transaction builder support lands
kips.status: Proposed; implemented and activated in TN10
kips.title: Covenant IDs

kips.kaspa_script_integration: treat OpChainblockSeqCommit as a future proof-bearing transition primitive with lane witness requirements
kips.title: Partitioned Sequencing Commitment with O(activity) Proving

maintenance_changes: seq-commit state and lane-proof RPC support
wallet/core and Wasm SMT sync progress notifications
covenant binding handling refinements across client and wallet components
Wasm client transaction v0 deserialization fix
upgrade.name: Toccata

node_requirements.rationale: Toccata doubles the transient mass limit to support ZK-STARK proof workloads.

rusty_kaspa_release.name: Mainnet Toccata Release - v2.0.1
rusty_kaspa_release.upgrade_note: drop-in update for v2.0.0 nodes and Toccata upgrade version for pre-Toccata 1.x nodes

transaction_format.pool_stratum_requirement: preserve the new fields from GetBlockTemplate through SubmitBlock
